source.multipart_basis: The original sample already specifies body_count=assembly (ASTM A992 steel frame + composite slab on metal deck) and lists member DCRs as the primary check. The multipart decomposition exposes the constituent structural members (columns, girders, beams, metal deck, composite slab, connection plates) as distinct part families.

full_prompt:
Design the ASCE CN3 Sustainable Solutions hyperscale data center structural bay as a multi-part assembly, explicitly modeling the 18.3 m x 12.2 m x 7.6 m rectangular steel-framed module as the physical collection of ASTM A992 columns, primary girders, secondary infill beams, metal deck, composite reinforced-concrete roof slab, base plates, and bolted/welded connection elements that form the single-bay module of a data center main hall.

The assembly consists of seven part families: (A) four corner steel columns, each a wide-flange ASTM A992 section extending the 7.6 m clear height from base plate to roof framing; (B) two long-span primary girders spanning the 18.3 m direction and two end girders spanning the 12.2 m direction, all wide-flange ASTM A992 sections composite with the slab; (C) secondary infill beams at regular spacing across the bay (typically at 3.05 m / 10 ft pitch) spanning the 12.2 m short direction, wide-flange ASTM A992 sections; (D) the metal deck, a corrugated galvanized steel form deck acting as permanent formwork and composite tension reinforcement below the slab; (E) the 150 mm thick normal-weight reinforced concrete roof slab (fc' 27.6 MPa / 4000 psi) acting compositely with the steel beams/girders; (F) four column base plates with anchor-bolt patterns fixed to the foundation; (G) the bolted/welded beam-to-girder and girder-to-column moment/shear connection elements (gusset plates, shear tabs, stiffeners, high-strength A325/F3125 bolts) that connect the steel frame together.

Geometry inherits the original sample verbatim: bay 18.3 m (60 ft) long x 12.2 m (40 ft) wide x 7.6 m (25 ft) floor to underside of roof, 150 mm composite slab.

Material inherits verbatim: primary steel ASTM A992 (Fy 345 MPa, Fu 450 MPa); concrete normal-weight fc' 27.6 MPa; recycled steel content target >= 50%.

Loads inherit verbatim: LC1 IT rack live 12.0 kPa uniform on tenant floor; LC2 roof MEP dead 2.4 kPa uniform on roof slab; LC3 roof snow 1.0 kPa (ASCE 7-22 flat-roof conversion from ground 1.44 kPa); LC4 wind 1.15 kPa equivalent static on long elevation (basic wind 51 m/s per ASCE 7-22 simplified); LC5 seismic ELF with base shear coefficient 0.10 at roof level.

Pass/fail criteria inherit verbatim from the original and apply at the assembly level: (R1) max member DCR per AISC 360-22 <= 1.0 across all load combinations in ASCE 7-22 Section 2.3; (R2) roof midspan deflection under 1.0 live + 1.0 dead <= 34 mm (span/360 for 12.2 m short direction); (R3) roof lateral drift under wind + seismic <= 19 mm (H/400 for 7.6 m height); (R4) recycled steel content >= 50% AND embodied carbon <= 300 kg CO2e per square meter of floor area. Added assembly-level targets under fem_check_policy.assembled_only: connection DCR at beam-to-girder and girder-to-column joints plus base-plate anchor DCR must be reported; per-part stresses are reported for diagnostic purposes but do not gate pass/fail.

Vibration, thermal, fluid, and radiation analyses are not required. An embodied-carbon ledger outside the FEA is required to compute kg CO2e / m^2 of floor area from material EPDs. Deliver STEP AP242 of the assembly with each body (each column, each primary girder, each infill beam, the deck, the slab, each base plate, each connection element) as a distinct solid tagged with part_family (A..G) and instance_index, plus an energy and carbon report listing member DCR maxima, roof midspan deflection, roof lateral drift, recycled content, embodied carbon per square meter, assembly mass, and connection DCR at each beam-to-girder and girder-to-column interface.
short_prompt:
Design the ASCE CN3 Sustainable Solutions hyperscale data-center structural bay as a multi-part ASTM A992 steel-framed assembly (four corner columns, four primary girders, ~5-7 secondary infill beams, metal deck, 150 mm composite RC slab, four column base plates, bolted/welded connection elements).

Bay 18.3 m x 12.2 m x 7.6 m; primary steel ASTM A992 (Fy 345 MPa, Fu 450 MPa); concrete fc' 27.6 MPa; recycled steel content target >= 50%.

Load cases: LC1 IT rack live 12.0 kPa on tenant floor; LC2 roof MEP dead 2.4 kPa; LC3 snow 1.0 kPa (ASCE 7-22, 1.44 kPa ground); LC4 wind 1.15 kPa on long elevation (51 m/s basic wind); LC5 seismic ELF 0.10 base-shear coefficient.

Pass/fail: AISC 360-22 member DCR <= 1.0; roof midspan deflection <= 34 mm (span/360 for 12.2 m); roof lateral drift <= 19 mm (H/400 for 7.6 m); embodied carbon <= 300 kg CO2e per m2; FEM at assembled level; connection DCR <= 1.0.

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: Embodied carbon per floor area is computed from material EPDs via the sustainability rubric, not by FEA.

prompt.title: Hyperscale data center bay 18.3 m x 12.2 m (multi-part assembly)
prompt.brief: Multi-part ASTM A992 steel-framed data-center bay: 4 corner columns (A) + 4 primary girders (B) + N secondary infill beams (C) + metal deck (D) + 150 mm composite slab (E) + 4 base plates (F) + bolted/welded connection elements (G). Verified at assembly level against AISC 360-22 member DCR <= 1.0, roof deflection <= 34 mm, drift <= 19 mm, embodied carbon <= 300 kg CO2e/m^2, and connection DCR <= 1.0 at each framed joint.

parts.name: steel_column
parts.role: ASTM A992 wide-flange corner column, 7.6 m floor-to-roof clear height; carries gravity reactions from primary girders and distributes seismic/wind base shear to the foundation

parts.name: primary_girder
parts.role: ASTM A992 wide-flange girder, two spanning the 18.3 m long direction and two spanning the 12.2 m short direction; carries roof slab gravity and MEP dead load, plus lateral beam-line reactions

parts.name: secondary_infill_beam
parts.role: ASTM A992 wide-flange infill beam spanning the 12.2 m short direction at approximately 3.05 m (10 ft) pitch between primary girders; carries tributary roof slab gravity + snow + MEP dead load
parts.count_note: Approximately 5-7 infill beams at 3.05 m pitch over the 18.3 m long direction

parts.name: metal_deck
parts.role: corrugated galvanized steel form deck acting as permanent formwork and composite tension reinforcement below the 150 mm RC slab; full bay footprint 18.3 x 12.2 m
parts.material_hint: ASTM A1008 galvanized steel sheet, team-selected gauge

parts.name: composite_rc_slab
parts.role: 150 mm normal-weight reinforced-concrete roof slab acting compositely with the steel beams/girders via shear studs; carries MEP + snow + live load

parts.name: column_base_plate
parts.role: column base plate with anchor-bolt pattern fixed to the foundation; transfers column axial + moment + shear into the foundation

geometric_constraints.plate: team-selected to satisfy base plate + anchor rod DCR

parts.material_hint: ASTM A572 Gr 50 steel + ASTM F1554 anchor rods

parts.name: connection_element
parts.role: bolted/welded beam-to-girder, girder-to-column, and infill-to-girder connection elements (shear tabs, gusset plates, stiffeners, A325/F3125 high-strength bolts); transfers shear + moment across the frame nodes
parts.count_note: Approximately 4 girder-to-column + 4 end girder-to-column + 10-14 infill beam-to-girder connections
parts.material_hint: ASTM A572 Gr 50 steel + ASTM F3125 Gr A325 bolts

assembly_envelope.coordinate_system: building coordinates: +x along 18.3 m long axis, +y along 12.2 m short axis, +z up from foundation

material.primary_steel: ASTM A992, Fy 345 MPa, Fu 450 MPa

load_cases.name: snow
load_cases.derivation: ground 1.44 kPa converted to flat-roof per ASCE 7-22

load_cases.name: wind
load_cases.derivation: 51 m/s basic wind at ASCE 7-22 simplified

boundary_conditions.column_bases: fixed to foundation via base plates + anchor rods
boundary_conditions.roof_slab: composite action with steel beams via headed shear studs

objective.primary: pass all code DCRs and drift limits under assembled_only FEM check
objective.secondary: minimize embodied carbon per floor area

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: AISC 360-22 Chapter J bolted/welded connection check at each beam-girder, girder-column, column-base joint
Generated coverage gate: ensures prompt-level envelope, body-count, report-field, and part geometry constraints are represented by an explicit geometry audit experiment.

recommended_fea_setup.element_type: beam for columns and girders, shell for slab and deck, connection elements as rigid links with DCR post-processor

interfaces.load_path: metal deck acts as permanent formwork and tension reinforcement beneath the 150 mm composite slab; transfers slab shear into the deck
girder-to-column moment/shear connection through gusset plates and high-strength bolts; transfers frame moment + shear from gravity + lateral cases
secondary beam-to-girder shear connection through shear tabs and high-strength bolts; transfers beam-line gravity reaction into the girder
headed shear studs welded to the top flange of the steel beams transfer horizontal shear between the concrete slab and the steel beams to develop composite action
column to base-plate welded connection plus anchor-rod tie-down to the foundation; transfers column axial + moment + shear into the foundation
connection-element bolts at column flanges provide moment connection capacity

fem_check_policy.rationale: Multipart entries are verified on the assembled model. Per-part stress is reported but does not gate pass/fail.

notes.why_multi_part: The original sample already calls out body_count=assembly; the multipart sidecar formalizes the column / girder / infill-beam / deck / slab / base-plate / connection-element decomposition as distinct part families.
notes.speculation_caveats: Exact wide-flange section sizes and connection-element counts are team-selected; the multipart sidecar asserts minimum counts (4 columns, 4 primary girders, 5+ infill beams) consistent with a single-bay data-center module.

generated_eval_coverage.purpose: Add runnable CCX coverage kit for JSON-only multipart prompt.
generated_eval_coverage.note: Generated checks assert solver coverage for every FEA-grade requirement, every declared load case, and prompt-level geometry constraints; they are not a domain-specific certification model.
